title: Contact | Priti Patel
meta_description: Dame Priti Patel - Conservative MP for Witham - latest news and campaigns
headings: h2: Please read the important information below
text_excerpt: Contact | Priti Patel Skip to main content Priti Patel MP for Witham Main navigation Home About Priti Local News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Priti Patel MP for Witham Contact Leave this field blank Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 3528 [email protected] Priti on Facebook Priti on X (Twitter) Priti on Instagram Priti receives a large volume of correspondence daily, but please be assured that all letters, e-mails, and telephone enquiries are each treated in the same way and will receive a reply as soon as possible. Please read the important information below If you are contacting Priti about a constituency related matter or are a resident living in the Witham constituency, please provide details of your issue, your full name and full postal address including postcode are included in correspondence with my office. If you have previously been in contact and have a case reference number, please provide this as it will assist in identifying your case. If you are writing on behalf of someone else, my office will require their written consent to comply with GDPR regulations. To help assist you with your case, I may need to forward your correspondence onto third parties such as: local authorities, Government departments or agencies, healthcare providers and private companies and organisations. If you do not live in the Witham constituency, please note that Parliamentary convention prevents me from taking up the cases which do not relate to the Witham constituency. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
